zh_CN.dialog_delete_msg:
确定要永久删除项目 "{name}" 及其所有数据吗？

此操作不可恢复！
zh_CN.dialog_zotero_not_found: 未找到 Zotero，请检查安装路径。
zh_CN.dialog_invalid_dir: 该目录不是有效的 Zotero 目录
zh_CN.tooltip_lang_switch: 切换到中文 / Switch to English
zh_CN.new_project_create_shortcut: ☑ 创建完成后在桌面生成快捷方式
zh_CN.pref_version_hint: 版本号用于匹配模板，请确保输入正确。查看方式：Zotero → 帮助 → 关于 Zotero
zh_CN.pref_profiles_hint:
这是您的项目库根目录。所有新建的项目都将存放在此目录下。
每个项目是一个独立的子文件夹，包含完整的数据和配置。
zh_CN.pref_default_language_hint: 新建项目时将使用此默认语言，您也可以在新建项目时单独修改。
zh_CN.first_launch_desc: 请先完成以下基本设置，之后可在偏好设置中修改。
zh_CN.first_launch_profiles_hint:
这是您的项目库根目录。所有新建的项目都将存放在此目录下。
每个项目是一个独立的子文件夹，包含完整的数据和配置。
zh_CN.first_launch_error_version: 请输入 Zotero 版本号
zh_CN.first_launch_error_path: 请选择有效的 Zotero 安装目录
zh_CN.first_launch_error_exe: 未找到 zotero.exe，请选择正确的安装目录
zh_CN.first_launch_error_template: 请选择有效的模板目录
zh_CN.first_launch_error_profiles: 请选择有效的项目库目录
zh_CN.dir_tooltip: 当前项目库路径，点击「浏览」可切换到其他项目库（如测试库）。
zh_CN.history_tooltip: 查看并切换之前使用过的项目库。
zh_CN.browse_tooltip: 浏览并切换到其他项目库目录。
zh_CN.default_tooltip: 将当前项目库设为默认，启动时自动加载。
zh_CN.language_dialog_hint: 更改语言后，下次启动该项目时生效。
zh_CN.language_dialog_failed: 语言设置更新失败，请检查项目配置文件。
zh_CN.delete_in_use_suggestion: 建议关闭所有 Zotero 窗口后重试。
zh_CN.delete_confirm_content_list:
将同时删除：
├── 所有文献数据 (zotero.sqlite)
├── 所有 PDF 附件 (storage/)
├── 所有配置和插件 (profiles/)
├── 桌面快捷方式
└── 项目库快捷方式
zh_CN.delete_confirm_recycle_hint: 项目将被移动到回收站，您可以在回收站中手动恢复。
zh_CN.delete_confirm_clear_warning: 如果清空回收站，则无法恢复！
zh_CN.delete_confirm_input_label: 请输入项目名称以确认删除：
zh_CN.delete_success_recover_hint:
💡 如需恢复，请打开系统回收站手动还原。
注意：清空回收站后将无法恢复！
zh_CN.delete_failed_possible_causes:
可能的原因：
├── Zotero 仍在运行该项目
├── 其他程序正在使用该目录中的文件
└── 回收站已满或磁盘空间不足
zh_CN.delete_failed_suggestions:
建议操作：
├── 关闭所有 Zotero 实例后重试
├── 检查是否有程序打开了该目录中的文件
└── 手动删除项目文件夹

en_US.dialog_delete_msg:
Are you sure you want to permanently delete project "{name}" and all its data?

This cannot be undone!
en_US.dialog_zotero_not_found: Zotero not found. Please check installation path.
en_US.tooltip_lang_switch: 切换到中文 / Switch to English
en_US.pref_version_hint: Version is used to match templates. Check your version via Zotero → Help → About Zotero.
en_US.pref_profiles_hint:
This is the root directory of your project library. All new projects will be stored here.
Each project is an independent subfolder containing complete data and configuration.
en_US.pref_default_language_hint: New projects will use this default language. You can also change it when creating a project.
en_US.first_launch_desc: Please complete the following basic settings first. You can modify them later in Preferences.
en_US.first_launch_profiles_hint:
This is the root directory of your project library. All new projects will be stored here.
Each project is an independent subfolder with complete data and configuration.
en_US.first_launch_error_path: Please select a valid Zotero installation directory
en_US.first_launch_error_exe: zotero.exe not found, please select correct installation directory
en_US.first_launch_error_template: Please select a valid template directory
en_US.first_launch_error_profiles: Please select a valid project library directory
en_US.dir_tooltip: Current project library path. Click 'Browse' to switch to another library (e.g., test library).
en_US.history_tooltip: View and switch to previously used project libraries.
en_US.browse_tooltip: Browse and switch to another project library directory.
en_US.default_tooltip: Set current project library as default, auto-loaded on startup.
en_US.language_dialog_hint: Language change will take effect on next launch.
en_US.language_dialog_failed: Failed to update language settings. Please check project configuration.
en_US.delete_in_use_suggestion: Please close all Zotero windows and try again.
en_US.delete_confirm_content_list:
The following will be deleted:
├── All literature data (zotero.sqlite)
├── All PDF attachments (storage/)
├── All configurations and plugins (profiles/)
├── Desktop shortcut
└── Library shortcut
en_US.delete_confirm_recycle_hint: Project will be moved to Recycle Bin. You can restore it from there.
en_US.delete_confirm_clear_warning: If you empty the Recycle Bin, it cannot be recovered!
en_US.delete_confirm_input_label: Enter project name to confirm deletion:
en_US.delete_confirm_checkbox: I confirm deletion of this project
en_US.delete_success_recover_hint:
💡 To restore, open Recycle Bin and restore manually.
Note: If you empty Recycle Bin, it cannot be recovered!
en_US.delete_failed_possible_causes:
Possible causes:
├── Zotero is still running this project
├── Another program is using files in this directory
└── Recycle Bin is full or disk space insufficient
en_US.delete_failed_suggestions:
Suggestions:
├── Close all Zotero instances and retry
├── Check if any program is using files in this directory
└── Manually delete the project folder
